entries.title: Audits stay read-only
entries.summary: Guided Mode reads system and app state, then explains readiness without changing Windows, game files, or tool settings.
entries.whyItMatters: A trustworthy pre-game check must not create a new variable while it is measuring the current setup.
entries.caveat: An action marked Preview only is not an apply workflow.

entries.title: Halo RTSS 240 baseline
entries.summary: The Halo profile is ready only when its RTSS profile uses FramerateLimit=240 and ApplicationDetectionLevel=2.
entries.whyItMatters: Using one explicit limiter profile prevents readiness from passing when RTSS is installed but not actively configured for Halo.
entries.sourceLabel: GPTOPT health model and smoke contract
entries.caveat: This is the current GPTOPT competitive baseline, not a universal best setting for every PC.

entries.title: Halo settings require backup-first changes
entries.summary: Any future Halo settings apply flow must back up SpecControlSettings.json before editing listed profile fields.
entries.whyItMatters: Game updates, hardware changes, and personal preferences can make a baseline unsuitable; the original file must remain recoverable.
entries.caveat: Guided Mode currently previews this action and does not edit the Halo JSON.

entries.title: Use a consistent session app stack
entries.summary: Readiness checks treat RTSS, audio routing, and controller software as session dependencies without requiring every optional app.
entries.whyItMatters: Comparing game feel is more useful when the limiter, audio route, and input path are known and repeatable.
entries.caveat: Missing Sonar or Flydigi software is a review item, not an automatic play blocker.

entries.title: Session reviews create player-specific evidence
entries.summary: GPTOPT stores rating, input feel, audio confidence, warmup outcome, routine completion, and notes in local app data.
entries.whyItMatters: Repeated observations can separate persistent setup problems from one bad match or a one-off feeling.
entries.caveat: Current reviews are descriptive history; they do not yet calculate trends or automatically change settings.
